items.html: *The fifth and sixth discernments: this is after the twelve years and one day, when her Partzuf has been completed and she has left the category of a minor, and she enters the discernments of Naar and Naarah. The matter of these two discernments, in brief, is this: besides what we require in the correction of the Partzuf of the female, we must also first correct in her — before she couples with her husband — the discernment of the vessel of the womb, corrected and fit to receive the drop of insemination and to form it within her, so that a newborn will be made of it; and also that the discernments of Mayin Nukvin [female waters] be prepared in her, as is known. Also included in this are discernments of doors and hinges, as our sages said on the verse "because it shut not up the doors of my womb," and on the verse "for her Tzirim [hinges, pangs] turned upon her."
